_about: Machine-readable feature inventory. Read at session start; update at session end. See CLAUDE.md → 'Agent handoff / 会话接力' for the workflow.

rules.only_one_in_progress: Only one feature may have status=in_progress at any time. Finish its verification (or move it to blocked) before starting another.
rules.evidence_before_passing: A feature moves to 'passing' ONLY when verification steps were actually run and proof (command output, screenshot path, test names + result) is recorded in 'evidence'.

features.title: Godot Steam port M0 — project scaffold (cross-repo)
features.user_visible_behavior: 新仓库 ~/mygit/calendar-puzzle-godot 跑起来；boot 加载 calendar_puzzle 模块显示 stub 标签；GodotSteam 4.19 GDExtension 集成（无 Steam 客户端时优雅降级到 standalone 模式）；GUT v9.5.0 测试框架就位，6/6 单测全绿。仓库已推到 GitHub private repo morefreeze/calendar-puzzle-godot。
verification: cd ~/mygit/calendar-puzzle-godot && godot --headless --script tests/run_tests.gd  — 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 orphans, 19 asserts, 0.46s

godot --headless --quit-after 3 res://boot/boot.tscn  — 输出包含 '[boot] starting Calendar Puzzle (M0 scaffold)' + '[boot] module 'calendar_puzzle' started'，Steam 未运行时 WARNING [SteamPlatform] steamInit failed — running standalone 优雅降级
git log --oneline | wc -l  — 13 commits on main
gh repo view morefreeze/calendar-puzzle-godot  — private, default branch main, pushed 2026-05-26T12:24:23Z
(待用户做) GUI 手测：godot 启动看 1280x720 窗口显示 'Calendar Puzzle stub running' + 副标题，截图存 docs/m0-smoke-screenshot.png
evidence: 2026-05-26: M0 plan 14 个 task 拆 5 个 subagent batch（implementer + reviewer 两段式）一次推完 13 commit。Batch 1 脚手架；Batch 2 抽象接口（GameManifest/SaveAdapter/InputContext/TranslationContext/PlatformBus/GameDeps/GameModule）；Batch 3 GodotSteam + GUT 装入；Batch 4 stubs + boot 入口（M0 编译通过门）；Batch 5 docs + GitHub push。

2026-05-26: 3 处 plan bug 现场识别 + 修：(1) TranslationContext.tr/tr_n 与 Object.tr 签名冲突 → 改 translate/translate_n（API 改动需同步 M7 plan）。 (2) GodotSteam GitHub repo 已 archive，subagent 用 Asset Library 2445 v4.19（Codeberg ac9bdbc）代替；同时 GUT godot_4 分支已删，用 v9.5.0 tag。 (3) Steam.steamInit() 4.14+ 返回 bool 不是 Dictionary（plan 写错），steam_platform.gd 改 ClassDB.class_exists + bool 处理。

2026-05-26: 6/6 GUT 测试绿（test_game_manifest 2 + test_calendar_puzzle_module 2 + test_boot_module_load 2），boot.tscn 端到端运行无 ERROR（只有 Godot 自身 doc_tools.cpp 的 ERR_FILE_CORRUPT 噪声不在范围）。GitHub push 完整 128MB 在 30 秒内完成。
2026-05-26: 已知 follow-up：(a) addons/godotsteam 93MB 二进制是 git-lfs 候选，建议在 repo 还小时（.git 32M）就迁移。 (b) STEAM_APP_ID 仍是 Spacewar 480，M11 上架前必换。 (c) M0 Task 11 真机 GUI 截图仍需用户手测一次。
features.notes: Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-26-godot-steam-port-design.md。Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-godot-steam-m0-scaffold.md。代码仓: ~/mygit/calendar-puzzle-godot (private GitHub: morefreeze/calendar-puzzle-godot)。Phase 1 of 3（Phase 2 = DLC 内容包；Phase 3 = 合集 Hub 改造）。M0 是 12 个 milestone 中第一个；M1-M11 plan 在 docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-godot-steam-m1..m11-*.md。

features.title: shareGroup decrypt follow-up — 0.4.0 升级后的解密兼容
features.user_visible_behavior: 好友点开分享链接、被拉入 shareGroup 时，群组信息能正确解密并展示助力进度。
verification: Plan recorded in commit 65b463d ("0.4.0 升级备注 + shareGroup decrypt follow-up plan").
End-to-end: 发起分享 → 好友点开 → 检查云函数 grantHelp / shareGroup 解密路径并保存 console 输出。
features.notes: Tracked by the 0.4.0 upgrade memo. Wait for tutorial-locked-step to land first.

features.title: Restructure API architecture (openspec change)
features.user_visible_behavior: /api/game-id 与 /api/solution 的请求/响应 schema 更内聚；Python solver / React / minigame 三端共用同一份契约。
verification: python -m pytest -v  — test_server_format / test_solver_format / test_end_to_end / test_no_solution 必须全绿.
Manual: curl POST /api/solution，断言响应字段与 BLOCK_TYPE_MAPPING 一致 (含 'Y'→'V-block', 'l'→'J-block' 的 quirk).
features.notes: 注意 solve_for_web.py 边界的 (x,y)↔(row,col) 交换 (line 48) 与 server.py:220 的 'if False and gameId in data' 有意禁用（commit bb9bf39）。不要'修复'.
